cards.title: JB (Cheech & Chong) — Ask for warm intros to licensed manufacturing partners
cards.notes: JB's MSO licensing partners = exact Newton ICP. Ask for 2-3 warm intros to their cannabis manufacturing licensees. Not a pitch to JB directly.

cards.title: future4200 — Convert solvent loss thread engagement into Newton leads
cards.notes: Bryan's deep technical thread on future4200 generated real engagement from extraction operators. Hunter to DM top responders with a soft intro to Newton. Drafts in workspace.

cards.title: Trucenta — LinkedIn outreach to Director of Extraction (Michigan)
cards.notes: Michigan's largest cannabis oil extraction facility. Find extraction lead on LinkedIn. Draft ready in Drafts tab — pending approval.

cards.title: Trulieve Florida — LinkedIn outreach to VP Ops / Extraction
cards.notes: FL MMTC, fully vertically integrated. Every run matters at their scale. Draft ready in Drafts tab — pending approval.

cards.title: Newton — Decide: software-only tier pricing (free vs $500/mo)
cards.notes: Decision pending. Bryan prefers product-led growth. Free tier drives adoption; $500/mo filters intent. No decision = no GTM.

cards.title: SCC/HUSA — Pull GA4 traffic & conversion trends, build growth proof
cards.notes: GA4 property ID 473280391. SEO guy does weekly work — need to show growth proof. Pull 90-day traffic trend, acquisition channels, top landing pages.

cards.title: Dime — Build auto-review flow: episode drops → Atlas pre-fills scorecard → pings Bryan
cards.notes: 48hr delay after publish for data to stabilize. Pull YouTube analytics + transcript. Pre-fill Podcast Review tab. Ping Bryan with highlights. Bryan approves in 2 min.

cards.title: Goals tab — Set X and LinkedIn follower baselines manually
cards.notes: YouTube baseline set: 6,740. X and LinkedIn baselines need one-time manual entry in Goals tab. Takes 60 seconds.

cards.title: Newton — FL & MI prospect list built, needs outreach sequencing
cards.notes: Prospect list in workspace (Newton_prospects_FL_MI.md). LinkedIn outreach drafts exist. Need Bryan approval to send.

cards.title: Dime — Build X growth system: daily post cadence + reply strategy
cards.notes: X algo in 2026 rewards 1-2 quality posts/day + 15-20 thoughtful replies. Rob C to draft a 2-week content cadence for Bryan's X account.
